notes: v0.16.29 — Hotfix: RIFT path cards were collapsing vertically — every step crammed into a thin strip at top of each card, footer overlapping header. Cause: HBoxContainer anchored TOP_WIDE had zero vertical height so cards' SIZE_EXPAND_FILL had nothing to expand into. Row now anchored FULL_RECT with proper top/bottom offsets, min card height 520. Step row height now scales to fill the card (min 32px so the boss disc never clips). EASY (4 nodes) gets tall comfortable steps, BRUTAL (11 nodes) packs tight but readable. Windows only.
